services.name: org.webosbrew.dtsenabler.service
services.description: Enable/disable DTS restore, report status, tune downmix, toggle Dolby Vision. All privileged work is proxied through the Homebrew Channel exec service.

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Install init.d stub + apply bind-mounts now

commands.name: status
commands.description: Report model/webOS/GStreamer, mount + rank + DV state

commands.name: setDownmix
commands.description: Persist downmix coefficients and re-apply gstcool.conf
